legacy.full_text:
OPEN CALL 🥀🔥
Share your Art ↓

I'm honored to curate the “Poetry Adaptations” art category for NFT Budapest. (Deadline: April 15)
– 10 artists will be selected.

Rules: RP, Like, Follow me & @NFT_BP , Tag Friends

Adapt classic poetry in whatever medium you choose ~ Good luck! https://t.co/Rg4pLVNIHu

legacy.name: Odd Writings

result.text: Word-unit palindrome poem on ethereum.  Read it backwards and forwards word-by-word, starting from the upper left, going down the column, then upper right and down the column; then do it in reverse.  The theme of the poem is "free will."  You start with it, then end without it. https://t.co/9EyLxySnLF

legacy.full_text: @LaurenceFuller @NFT_BP Word-unit palindrome poem on ethereum. You start with it, then end without it. https://t.co/OwN7Uli3dj

result.text:
thank you for the opportunity @LaurenceFuller 
here is my work

Echoes of Olympe  "Women have the right to mount the scaffold; they must equally have the right to mount the rostrum." Olympe de Gouges’ words still resonate today, a testament to the quiet strength of those who refuse to be erased. She stands, resilient and unwavering, reminding us that progress is never given, it is taken.

and i tag @2ANetes @Lord_iiiip @Dougi555

result.text:
Hi dear @LaurenceFuller 🌹
🔵Me, You, & The Moon🌙

In the stillness of the night,
I talk to the moon about you,
Whispering untold words that only my heart knew,
Among the twinkling stars that light up the sky,
I pour out my feelings, 
letting my emotions fly.

5/10 ed
Digital painting, vector 
0.009 eth
#Base

@TheCircleArt @lovaniceth
You friends may have poetry related art to share✨✨
https://t.co/GDLQy89ShE

result.text:
'Loneliness. Music for eternity.' by Igor Leontiev

There is a man in it - a musician and an observer, and everything that surrounds him - as if generated by the music he created and the imagination of the observer. Changeable, mysterious and unpredictable, like music itself. As long as there is an observer, the world exists.
